table-414-414.pgTitle: Card Rulings by Date and Rarity
table-414-414.caption: How many cards with print rarity have ruling text printed on 10/01/2009?
data: This card can only be activated during your Main Phase.
You can discard this card to negate the attack of a monster.
This card gains 500 ATK for each monster on your opponent's side of the field.
This card cannot be destroyed by battle.
When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 Spell Card from your Deck to your hand.
